name: Next Day Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cooked rice in a microwave or double boiler with some raisins and sugar to taste.
2. When hot, gradually stir in half and half until the rice has absorbed some of it and is warm and creamy.
3. Taste for sweetness and dust with a sprinkling of ground cinnamon, fresh raspberries, or sliced seedless grapes.
